usefulness_evaluation.narrative: All 11 status machine tests passed. Phase 1: CreateTrip defaults to PLANNING, CreateTrip with ACTIVE works (PR #197 verified), PLANNING->ACTIVE->COMPLETED transitions succeed. Phase 2: All 3 invalid transitions from COMPLETED correctly return failed_precondition (PR #198 sentinel error mapping verified). Phase 3: CreateTrip with COMPLETED status returns invalid_argument. Phase 4: Non-existent UUID returns not_found, invalid UUID returns invalid_argument via buf.validate.
